name: Crab-Biscuit Shortcakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in the top of a double boiler.
2. Add flour and blend.
3. Add soup and cook, stirring constantly, until thickened.
4. Slice eggs and add to soup with crab meat.
5. Cook over hot water until thoroughly heated.
6. Add salt and pepper to taste.
7. Serve over thin, crusty baking-powder biscuits that have been split and lightly buttered.
8. Makes 4 generous servings.
